context: Tests whether the Contacts skill handles iOS limited Contacts authorization without blocking usable selected-contact access.

checklist.name: Usable authorization states
checklist.description: Treats both .authorized and .limited as Contacts API states where app fetch/save features can proceed.

checklist.name: Limited access caveat
checklist.description: Explains that .limited exposes only user-granted contacts and contacts the app creates, not the full address book.

checklist.name: Expansion controls
checklist.description: Recommends ContactAccessButton or contactAccessPicker for letting the person add contacts to the app's limited-access set.

checklist.name: Picker boundary
checklist.description: Distinguishes limited-access management from CNContactPickerViewController, which returns final selections rather than granting store-wide access.
